title: How to receive external feedback in a column of the same element
excerpt:
I need to receive feedback from external people in the columns that I have generated in my dashboard. One of them is validation (validated, needs changes) and another text column with the necessary changes. 
The problem …

posts.author: DavidColl (David)
posts.cookedHtml:
I need to receive feedback from external people in the columns that I have generated in my dashboard. One of them is validation (validated, needs changes) and another text column with the necessary changes.
The problem is that new tasks are generated for me if I use forms and I am interested in receiving feedback on the same element.

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey David!

It sounds like the app SuperForm could be really helpful for this! Some users have used it for allowing multiple form submissions to edit the same item instead of creating new items.

Let us know what you think of it!
